title: Metal Stairs
description: Adds new Stairs and Slabs based of existing Vanilla Ores
body:
Metal Stairs is a fabric mod which adds Iron, Gold, Lapis, Copper, Diamond, Netherite, Emerald, Redstone and Coal Stairs and Slabs to Minecraft, these use the same recipe shape as any other Stair/Slab. Can also be crafted in a stone-cutter. To make a Netherite Stair/Slab, put a Diamond Stair/Slab in a smithing table with a Netherite Scrap.

 

 

 

Join my Discord! Please check out my Other Mods, They work great with this one!
